content.en:
Near the Dark Mist Territory, Ye Tian's two replica bodies fought with the Dark Mist Lord's body.

At this time, the Lord of Ice Han was watching, and several other Legendary Realm Lords were observing this battle.

"The Endless Lord has such a powerful strength!"

The Holy Peak Lord was shocked.

Although the strength of the Dark Mist Lord is not the strongest among the six Legendary Realm Lords, it is not the weakest, and it has been a long time since he became a Legendary Realm Lord, and his strength is much stronger than the Legendary Realm Lord who has just broken through.

Moreover, the Immortal Realm Lord is too weak compared to the Legendary Realm Lord, and it stands to reason that the Legendary Realm Lord can severely damage or even kill the top Immortal Realm Lord.

But Ye Tian could compete with a legendary realm lord like the Dark Mist Lord, which was incredible.

"The Endless Lord is comparable to a true Legendary Realm Lord!"

Lord Ice muttered.

They did not participate in the battle between Ye Tian and the Darkmist Lord, although they had known the Darkmist Lord for a longer time, they were also in competition with each other, and it was impossible to offend Ye Tian for the Darkfog Lord.

In addition, they could see that Ye Tian had a combat power comparable to that of a Legendary Realm Lord in the Immortal Realm Lord Realm.

Therefore, they didn't want to offend Ye Tian.

If the Dark Mist Lord had known Ye Tian's strength earlier, he wouldn't have wanted to be an enemy of Ye Tian, but now that he was already an enemy, naturally there was no room for reconciliation.

Time passed slowly, and the battle between Ye Tian and the Dark Mist Lord had spread throughout the entire space-time territory, and many Eternal Realms had come to observe this battle, but they did not dare to approach, but began to observe the battle in a distant area.

If you get closer, you will be killed by the battle fluctuations between Ye Tian and the Dark Mist Lord if you are not careful.

At first, they didn't know the reason why Ye Tian was fighting with the Dark Mist Lord, but it was soon revealed.

After all, Ye Tian and the clone of the Dark Mist Lord were fighting in the Source Sea, and those Legendary Realm Lords could know after a little probing.

Suddenly, the other five Legendary Lords were excited.

This is an eternal treasure, a real eternal treasure, not a space-time projection of the eternal treasure, this is still the first eternal treasure of the source sea, which is of great significance.

If they obtain this eternal treasure, their strength will surely skyrocket.

At this time, the five Legendary Lords finally understood why Ye Tian fought with the Dark Mist Lord, it must be for this eternal treasure.

Whoa!!

The clones of the five Legendary Lords came to the Source Sea, waiting silently in the place where the Eternal Supreme Treasure was born, even if Ye Tian and the Dark Mist Lord were fighting nearby, they didn't care.

...

"Endless Lord, the other Five Legendary Realm Lords have discovered the Eternal Treasure here, there is no point in us fighting!

The Lord of the Mist said.

He didn't want to fight anymore because he was at a disadvantage.

If he continues to fight, he is in real danger of falling.

Even if it was just the fall of a clone, it would be a huge loss, so he wanted to stop with Ye Tian.

"Don't think!"

Ye Tian directly refused.

The Lord of the Mist wanted to stop, he didn't want to.

The Lord of the Dark Mist dared to threaten him, and even wanted to attack the Dark Forbidden Realm, which was tantamount to touching his scales.

As for the discovery of the Eternal Arcana, then it will be discovered, anyway, the Eternal Arcana has not really been conceived yet, and he is not in a hurry at all.

In the following days, Ye Tian frantically besieged the three major bodies of the Dark Mist Lord.

After a while, the clone of the Dark Mist Lord who was besieged by Ye Tian's three major bodies couldn't hold on, after all, these three bodies were still assisted by the Mixed Yuan Order, and he was naturally far from being an opponent.

At this time.

The doppelganger of the Lord of the Dark Mist was full of cracks, and the countless particles inside his body were shattered by the half-step Legendary Eternal Technique.

Finally on this day, the doppelganger of the Dark Mist Lord was completely killed by Ye Tian.

A doppelganger was killed, which was a catastrophe for the Lord of the Dark Mist!

Wow!!!

Ye Tian's three major bodies tore through the space-time barrier of the Source Sea, and went to the Dark Mist Territory, preparing to unite the other two bodies and use the five major bodies to besiege and kill the Dark Mist Lord's body.

Once the Darkmist Lord's body is killed, the other clone will also collapse.

Boom Boom Boom !!

Ye Tian's three major body sources made the Dark Mist Lord's body tremble.

Although the main body has the most weapon hole cards, it is not much stronger than the other two clones, and it is impossible to resist Ye Tian's five major bodies, once it is surrounded, there is really a risk of falling.

It's just that the doppelganger is killed, although the loss is very heavy and not unbearable, but once the body falls, it really falls.

After all, the Dark Mist Lord is not like Ye Tian, and the six major bodies can be counted as the main body.

"Run!"

The Lord of the Dark Mist was instigated and fled at all costs.

Soon, the Dark Mist Lord fled into the distant Void Region, while Ye Tian's five major bodies pursued him.

But at this moment, the clone of the Dark Mist Lord in the Source Sea began to rush madly towards the Dark Forbidden Domain

Ye Tian's strength is indeed very strong, but there is no way to completely stop the Dark Mist Lord from attacking the Dark Forbidden Domain, if the Dark Mist Lord is desperate, he can still severely damage or even destroy the Dark Forbidden Domain. 100

In desperation, Ye Tian had to transfer back several replica bodies to help the one in the source sea to stop the Dark Mist Lord.

In this way, the Darkmist Lord's body has a great hope of escaping.

Obviously, the Lord of the Mist sacrificed his second avatar to gain hope of escaping for his life.

"Or let the Darkmist Lord's body escape"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

The speed of the Darkmist Lord is not very fast, but he has a lot of hole cards, and there is also a special Eternal Kui Treasure, which directly helped him escape to the depths of the Void Zone, but he could not lock the position for a short time.

Unable to lock the location for a short time, with the speed of the Dark Mist Lord, he naturally fled and disappeared.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's six major bodies besieged the clone left by the Dark Mist Lord in the Source Sea, and quickly killed this clone.

At this point, only the main body of the Dark Mist Lord escaped, and the two clones fell in the Source Sea.

Regarding the fate of the Dark Mist Lord, the other five Legendary Realm Lords were very surprised, so they were all very jealous of Ye Tian.

Soon after, the Eternal Treasure in the Source Sea was truly conceived.

At this time, it is up to who can take this eternal treasure. _
